prompts.name: grandes_felinos_livre
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Arabian desert dunes at dawn: A grand lion prowls through golden sand dunes bathed in the soft, warm light of sunrise. The lion's majestic form is accentuated by the play of shadows and highlights on its tawny stripes, creating a sense of power and grace. Its eyes, filled with an ancient wisdom, meet the viewer's gaze from beneath arched eyebrows. The scene captures the solitude of this apex predator in its natural habitat, showcasing the global diversity of big cats - a leopard lies camouflaged on a distant rocky outcrop, and a jaguar is silhouetted against the rising sun in the distance. A sense of nature's prowess pervades as the early morning air vibrates with life, from the sweeping sands to the resilient cacti dotting the landscape. The composition focuses on the lion and its surroundings, evoking awe and respect for these magnificent creatures. Canon EOS R5, 16-35mm f/2.8, f/11, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

prompts.name: grandes_felinos_livre_2
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Indoor big cat enclosure in a lush, tropical rainforest biome - A majestic jaguar, sporting vibrant rosettes on its golden fur, stands alone against the backdrop of dense greenery and dappled sunlight filtering through the foliage. The atmospheric quality is heavy with moisture, creating an ethereal glow on the jaguar's sinewy muscles and sharp teeth that hint at its power and grace. Its piercing green eyes lock onto the camera, conveying a sense of solitude and raw intensity. The composition focuses on the jaguar while subtly incorporating elements of nature's prowess with surrounding vegetation, adding to the global felines theme.

Canon EOS R5, 24-70mm f/2.8, f/8, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: grandes_felinos_livre_3
prompts.text:
Medium format RAW capture, professional photography: African savannah at sunset - Serengeti Plains, Tanzania. A breathtaking dusk scene unfolds as the setting sun casts long, warm shadows over golden grasses and scattered acacia trees. The air is filled with the distinct scent of damp earth and burning savannah.

The composition revolves around a solitary leopard (Panthera pardus) poised atop a termite mound, its fiery-orange coat illuminated by the last rays of the sun. The leopard's eyes glimmer with predatory intent and keen awareness, embodying the power and grace of nature's greatest hunters.

In the distance, a jaguar (Panthera onca) stalks through the long grasses of the Pantanal wetlands in Brazil, its majestic form echoing the grandeur of the setting. Its spotted coat blends effortlessly with the dappled sunlight filtering through the foliage, adding an air of mystery to the scene.

The photograph showcases the big cat intimacy and solitary hunter themes as these two global felines, continents apart, embody the raw beauty and untamed wildness of their respective habitats. Nature's prowess is undeniable in this powerful, evocative image that celebrates the grandes_felinos in their natural African savannah habitat.

Hasselblad X2D, 45mm f/3.5, f/8, ISO 64, ultra realistic, National Geographic.

Captured with Hasselblad X2D, 45mm f/3.5, f/8, ISO 64, this ultra-realistic image speaks to the prowess of nature's apex predators and the intimacy between humans and these global felines. prompts.name: russian_tundra_durin_sunset_golden_h

The golden hour sun casts warm light through morning mist, accentuating the power and grace of this global apex predator as it surveys its vast territory. Texture of ice, snow, and fur is captured in pristine detail by the Canon EOS R5, with nature's prowess on full display. Big cat intimacy unfolds within the wilderness majesty, evoking a sense of both the solitary hunter's dominance and its fragile existence among the world's grand felines. Ultra realistic, National Geographic.
